description: §48.5.1 clean neg — a `lift` inside a `fn` body that accumulates into a `fn`-LOCAL `~`, closed by `return ~`, SHALL NOT fire E-FN-008. This is the SPEC-canonical valid shape (§48.5: 'a `fn` body does permit `lift`: it accumulates into a `~` local to the `fn` body, which the `fn` then returns explicitly with `return ~`'). Contrast with `fn/lift-outer-accumulator-reject` (targets an outer `~`). `notCodes` asserts E-FN-008 stays silent.
rationale: §48.5.1: `lift` inside `fn` is valid when it accumulates into a `~` local to the same `fn` body and the `fn` returns it with `return ~`; nothing crosses the `fn` boundary, so E-FN-008 does not fire.
